case_title: PASION, CHRISTINE VS EZ INSURANCE BROKERAGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY PASION, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT EZ INSURANCE BROKERAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO ANY KIND SERV EZ INS. BROKERAGE RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASION, CHRISTINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EZ INSURANCE BROKERAGE $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20.00, COST ONLY; NO DAMAGES AWARDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EZ INSURANCE BROKERAGE
